change applies.

4 Quality Information Document for OMI Med Ocean Salt Content 
 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
CMEMS-MED-OMI-QUID-CLIMATE_OSC 
Issue 1.1 – May 2025 
1) INTRODUCTION 
a) Product Name  
 
OMI_CLIMATE_OSC_MEDSEA_volume_mean  
 
b) Indicator Evaluation Method 
 
Ocean salt content (OSC) is defined and represented here as the volume average of 
the integral of salinity in the Mediterranean Sea from z1 = 0 m to z2 = 300 m depth: 
𝑆 =
1
𝑉 ∫ 𝑆
 
𝑉 dV         [1] 
Time series of annual mean values area averaged ocean salt content is provided for 
the Mediterranean Sea (30°N, 46°N; 6°W, 36°E) and is evaluated where the 
bathymetry is deeper than 300 m. The total volume estimated is approximately 5.7e+5 
km3.

catalog_entry.summary: This Quality Information Document evaluates the ocean salt content for the Mediterranean Sea, providing details on its computation and validation process.

product_line.name: Ocean Monitoring Indicators - Climate Oscillation Index for the Mediterranean Sea
